title: Why did you file this PIL? Supreme Court grills Indian Young Lawyers Association for Sabarimala PIL
description: The hearing before a 9-judge Bench of the Supreme Court in the case surrounding entry of women to Sabarimala temple and other larger religious issues was privy to some sharp remarks and questions posed by the Bench to counsel appearing for the lead petitioner in the original case, Indian Young Lawyers' AssociationIt was a public interest litigation (PIL) petition filed by the body which had led to the Supreme Court's 2018 verdict allowing women of all ages to enter Sabarimala temple, thereby tri
